markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GTM campaign performance and brainstorm new outreach strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Campaigns are outperforming benchmarks:** Email outreach yields 1 positive reply per 217 leads (vs. a 1:400 market benchmark), and LinkedIn outreach is hitting its 20% reply rate KPI.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**New strategy: Segment lists by seniority.** Use LinkedIn for high-value leads (e.g., Pavilion members) and email for broader audiences (e.g., Exit 5 members) to maximize the impact of each channel.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Build an evergreen intent engine.** Integrate Sift (LinkedIn engagement monitoring) with Clay and outreach tools to automatically nurture warm leads who engage with GrowthX or competitor content.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**Jason Gong is the primary GTM strategist.** Understory will proactively flag optimization opportunities (e.g., list segmentation) for Jason's approval, leveraging his deep business context.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### Campaign Performance & Strategy

  - [**Strong Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**LinkedIn (HeyReach):** Connection acceptance rate \>20%; reply rate \~20% (on KPI).](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**Email (Instantly):** 40 positive leads generated; 1 positive reply per 217 leads (nearly 2x the 1:400 market benchmark).](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Strategic Adjustments:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Volume:** Increased email infrastructure to scale volume, as LinkedIn outreach is capped at 60 connection requests/day.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Sender Alias:** Jason Gong is now the primary sender (75% of volume) to avoid setting false expectations from Marcel's name. Mark Lim will compare reply rates for both aliases.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Repetition:** Re-engaging past webinar invitees is acceptable, as the low-commitment offer is unlikely to cause annoyance.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### List Building & Management

  - [**New Lists:** Understory is building lists from high-intent sources.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Pavilion & Exit 5 member directories](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Competitor event attendee lists](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Competitor LinkedIn page followers (e.g., Profound, Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Centralized Storage:** All lists will be consolidated in a Google Sheet and GrowthX's Clay instance, with a "Source" column for clear tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### New Strategy: Evergreen Intent Engine

  - [**Goal:** Automate outreach to warm leads who show intent by engaging with LinkedIn content.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**Tool:** Sift, which monitors LinkedIn accounts (GrowthX, competitors) and filters engagements by ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
    1.  [**Sift → Clay:** Push ICP-filtered engagement data into a Clay table.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
    2.  [**Clay Enrichment:** Add account data and apply custom logic.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
    3.  [**Clay → Outreach:** Push enriched leads to Instantly or HeyReach for automated, personalized campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

### Process & Future Growth

  - [**Process Improvement:** To prevent project stalls, Jason Gong will provide clear, prioritized project definitions. Understory will proactively flag optimization opportunities for Jason's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Future Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [**Hiring:** Jason Gong is hiring a demand gen/GTM specialist to increase internal capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [**Ads:** GrowthX will consider paid ads once the community motion is repeatable. Understory's ad management service requires a minimum $10k/channel ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mark Lim:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [Compare reply rates for Jason Gong vs. Marcel sender aliases and share findings on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [Share new lead lists (Pavilion, Exit 5, etc.) via Google Sheet, GrowthX's Clay instance, and a Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [**Jason Gong:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Invite Understory to the Sift tool.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Define and prioritize projects for the evergreen intent engine.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [**Understory Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Set up the Sift → Clay webhook connection.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Scope and plan the evergreen intent engine campaign with Jason Gong.](https://fathom.video/share/D1mYz7SypyXzdHaAatN776x7GvzpAgBj?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
